by Timesact
This site uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Learn More
Manage consent preferences
Reject all Accept all
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience.
Strictly necessary cookies
Always allowed
These cookies are essential in order to enable you to move around the website and use its features, such as accessing secure areas of the website. Without these cookies services you have asked for, like shopping baskets or e-billing, cannot be provided.

Functionality cookies
These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make (such as your user name, language or the region you are in) and provide enhanced, more personal features. For instance, a website may be able to provide you with local weather reports or traffic news by storing in a cookie the region in which you are currently located. These cookies can also be used to remember changes you have made to text size, fonts and other parts of web pages that you can customise. They may also be used to provide services you have asked for such as watching a video or commenting on a blog. The information these cookies collect may be anonymised and they cannot track your browsing activity on other websites.

Performance cookies
These cookies collect information about how visitors use a website, for instance which pages visitors go to most often, and if they get error messages from web pages. These cookies don’t collect information that identifies a visitor. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. It is only used to improve how a website works.

Targeting cookies
These cookies are used to deliver adverts more relevant to you and your interests They are also used to limit the number of times you see an advertisement as well as help measure the effectiveness of the advertising campaign. They are usually placed by advertising networks with the website operator’s permission. They remember that you have visited a website and this information is shared with other organisations such as advertisers. Quite often targeting or advertising cookies will be linked to site functionality provided by the other organisation.

Excellent
4.79 based on 
55,797 reviews
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 17e / 16e - Tempered Glass Screen Protector (x2)
Good instructions and easy to fit and will stop scratching and wear and tear on the screen without a doubt. My previous iphone had these issues from cards stored in my phone case.
10 minutes ago
Verified Customer
Samsung Galaxy S25 - Metro Leather Wallet Phone Case Jet Black (Dappled)
The dappled leather is a nice change from the vintage finish that I had last time and looks very smart. I find that the silicone edges are rather high and bulky and preferred the transparent version that I had previously. Also the buttons need to be pressed quite hard to activate them but perhaps this will improve with use. The magnetic closure seems unnecessarily long but is secure. All in all a sleek new look.
13 hours ago
Verified Customer
Vintage Belt Pouch - Large Plum / iPhone SE / iPhone 5 / iPhone 5s
Great quality. Fits my iphone 13 mini fine.
18 hours ago
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 17 - Vintage Leather Wallet Phone Case Bottle Green
Fabulous case. Very protective, gorgeous colour, great fit, lovely to hold and easy to remove and replace when using on mount in car. It’s the second one I’ve owned, the previous one was still great after six years, only retired due to new phone.
22 hours ago
Verified Customer
Metro Leather Apple Watch Strap Racing Green (Dappled) / (38 / 40 / 41mm) / Rose Gold
Excellent quality, fit and delivered promptly.
1 day ago
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 17e / 16e - Vintage Leather Wallet Phone Case Chestnut Brown
Spot on
1 day ago
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max- Tempered Glass Screen Protector (x2)
Edges felt jagged and glass even cracked as I pushed out air. Luckily 2 provided. Previously I had purchased lens protector with reinforced edges and a nifty piece of kit that smoothed out air automatically and removed need to touch the glass.
2 days ago
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max - Vintage Leather Wallet Phone Case Teal
Feels good. Looks good. Wish the magnet fastener was a little stronger and the stand facility was a bit more steady and even, but it works. Overall happy.
2 days ago
Verified Customer
Metro Leather Bifold Wallet Jet Black
Good quality
2 days ago
Verified Customer
Samsung Galaxy A57 - Metro Leather Wallet Phone Case Rich Tan
I was dissapointed when the Metro Leather Walley Phone Case in Rich Tan arrived, it didn't look pleasing to the eye unlike my Vintage Leather Walley Phone Case I had purched a few years ago for my Samsung Galexy Note 10+. I have returned tbe Rich Tan Case & have got a full refund, the staff were very helpful & quick to respond to my e-mail. If you do decide to make the Sansung Galaxy A57 case in a Vintage Leather then I would ourchase one as they look lovely, age well & the build is of good quality.
3 days ago
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 16 Pro Max - Metro Slim Leather Phone Case Hunter Green
I absolutely love the look and feel of my phone case. It's great quality and a luscious colour
3 days ago
Verified Customer
Vintage Leather Glasses Sleeve Navy
It looks good and looks after my shades!! Really pleased with it and the service I've recieved.
3 days ago
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max - Vintage Leather Wallet Phone Case Navy
It's good quality ,but there's a small cut out section on the side which is very annoying. A redesigned side folding section to make it flush with the rest of the cover would be alot better .back to the drawing board chaps
3 days ago
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 17 Pro - Vintage Leather Wallet Phone Case Navy
I've already got one of these covers in vintage leather on my old iPhone which is a fabulous cover ( can wipe it ) , the new one is suede not vintage leather . Completely different fabric . Unfortunately I didn't open it until my daughter came to swop over my phones a few days ago. So it gone past the returns date Why is it not advertised as suede ?
4 days ago
Verified Customer
Apple iPhone 17 Pro - Vintage Leather Wallet Phone Case Teal
This is my second Snakehive phone case. Am happy as can store credit cards and can stand it up. However, being leather and strong it is quite heavy. A wider range of colours would be nice, red, purple etc!
5 days ago
Pause

GREAT THINGS TAKE TIME

Our design geeks at Snakehive HQ in Surrey, England spend their days drumming up new ways to protect your valued possessions, from your cellphone to your passport . Accessories such as our Vintage Leather Wallet began life as a brilliant idea on paper. We paw over materials and draft designs for months before committing to our first samples.

Because only the best will do

Our Vintage Leather Wallets are handmade in Europe, using the finest selection of genuine nubuck leather. Gently sanded to produce a soft, suede texture, it develops a rich patina with age, making it uniquely yours.

Anything worth having, is worth waiting for

Some things just aren’t worth rushing, especially something you want to last. We focus on quality accessories that stand the test of time, hand stitching each item with care.

Good enough for us, perfect for you

Producing quality accessories is our mantra, so every phone case undergoes a rigorous quality check before we let it leave home.

“Very reasonably priced considering its skilful construction”

"It looks gorgeous and feels great in your hands"

"Classy and high-end but nonetheless affordable"

"One of the most stylish options on the market"

FREE UK SHIPPING OVER £30

personalisation on selected leather products

here to help - reach us by PHONE, LIVECHAT AND EMAIL

Secure payments and checkout process

Want 10% off your first order? 

 

Receive 10% off your first order and be the first to know about our new products, deals and all things leather!

It’s what’s inside that counts

We believe that wealth is in the mind, not the wallet. Fast-fashion-phobic, we choose substance over style every time.
